title: Check if two numbers are equal

content.problemStatement:
You are tasked with comparing the grades of two students. 
Write a program that takes the grades of two students as input and compares them using the `==` and `!=` comparison operators. 
The program should print whether the students have the same grade or different grades based on the comparison.

---

sampleTestCases.output:
The grades are different.
The grades are different.

The grades are the same.
The grades are the same.
